Scripts.OnLoad: Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigSellingAllItemsFrameMixin); self:OnLoad(); self.DurationGroup:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.TitleArea, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.SaveLastDurationAsDefault:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.DurationGroup, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.SalesPreference:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.SaveLastDurationAsDefault, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.UndercutPercentage:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.SalesPreference, "BOTTOMLEFT", 0, -7); self.UndercutValue:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.SalesPreference, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.StackSizesHeading:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.UndercutValue, "BOTTOMLEFT", 0, -35); self.DefaultStacks:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.StackSizesHeading, "BOTTOMLEFT", 25, -10); self.ResetStackSizeMemory:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.DefaultStacks, "BOTTOMLEFT", -2, 0); self.GearPriceMultiplierHeading:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.ResetStackSizeMemory, "BOTTOMLEFT", -23, 0); self.GearPriceMultiplier:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.GearPriceMultiplierHeading, "BOTTOMLEFT", 0, -15); self.StartingPricePercentageHeading:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.GearPriceMultiplier, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.StartingPricePercentage:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.StartingPricePercentageHeading, "BOTTOMLEFT", 0, -15); self.IgnoreItemSuffix:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.StartingPricePercentage, "BOTTOMLEFT")
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigurationTitleFrameMixin); self.titleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_ALL_ITEMS_CATEGORY; self.subTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_TBC_ALL_ITEMS; self:OnLoad()
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigRadioButtonMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_AUCTION_DURATION_12; self.value = 12; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigRadioButtonMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_AUCTION_DURATION_24; self.value = 24; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigRadioButtonMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_AUCTION_DURATION_48; self.value = 48; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigRadioButtonGroupMixin); self.groupHeadingText = AUCTIONATOR_L_DEFAULT_AUCTION_DURATION; self:InitializeRadioButtonGroup()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigCheckboxMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SAVE_LAST_DURATION_AS_DEFAULT; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SAVE_LAST_DURATION_AS_DEFAULT_TOOLTIP_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SAVE_LAST_DURATION_AS_DEFAULT_TOOLTIP_TEXT; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigRadioButtonMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_PERCENTAGE; self.value = "percentage"; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigRadioButtonMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_SET_VALUE; self.value = "static"; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigRadioButtonGroupMixin); self.groupHeadingText = AUCTIONATOR_L_UNDERCUT_PREFERENCE; self:InitializeRadioButtonGroup()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigNumericInputMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_PERCENTAGE_SUFFIX; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_PERCENTAGE_TOOLTIP_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_PERCENTAGE_TOOLTIP_TEXT; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigMoneyInputMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_SET_VALUE_SUFFIX; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_UNDERCUT_TOOLTIP_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_UNDERCUT_TOOLTIP_TEXT; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad(); self.Label:SetPoint("LEFT", self.MoneyInput, "RIGHT", 5, 0)
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigurationSubHeadingMixin); self.subHeadingText = AUCTIONATOR_L_DEFAULT_STACK_SIZES; self:InitializeSubHeading()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorStackOfInputMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_DEFAULT_QUANTITY_SUFFIX; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_DEFAULT_QUANTITY_TOOLTIP_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_DEFAULT_QUANTITY_TOOLTIP_TEXT; self.classID = Enum.ItemClass.Armor; self:OnLoad(); self.MaxNumStacks:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.NumStacks, "BOTTOMLEFT", 10, -4); self.Label:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.NumStacks, "TOPRIGHT", 10, -3); self.StackSize:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.Label, "TOPRIGHT", 10, 3); self.MaxStackSize:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.StackSize, "BOTTOMLEFT", 10, -4)
self.dynamicResizeMinWidth = 40; DynamicResizeButton_Resize(self)
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigurationSubHeadingMixin); self.subHeadingText = AUCTIONATOR_L_GEAR_VENDOR_PRICE_MULTIPLIER; self:InitializeSubHeading()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigNumericInputMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_GEAR_VENDOR_PRICE_MULTIPLIER_SUFFIX; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_GEAR_VENDOR_PRICE_MULTIPLIER_TOOLTIP_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_GEAR_VENDOR_PRICE_MULTIPLIER_TOOLTIP_TEXT; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()
